title: bufonia tenuifolia var. parviflora
intro: Bufonia tenuifolia var. parviflora, also known as dwarf bufonia, is a plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and thin, narrow leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Bufonia tenuifolia var. parviflora can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through methods such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
